description: Distribute three scanned files from the 'Drop Box' folder to their target workspaces under /default-domain/workspaces/ and rename them according to standard conventions. Move 'Scan_Contract_Acme_v2.pdf' to the 'Contracts' workspace as 'Contract - Acme v2', 'Scan_Invoice_992_Q3.pdf' to the 'Invoices' workspace as 'Invoice 992 Q3', and 'IMG_Site_Photo_0023.jpg' to the 'Assets' workspace as 'Site Photo 0023'. Ensure the 'Drop Box' folder is empty when finished.
